executive_summary.verdict: PYPL is trading at a massive discount to DCF. Market is too pessimistic about competition fears.
executive_summary.key_insight: DCF $100 vs Price $46 = 117% below fair value. FCF growing 15%+ annually.

graham.recommendation: Graham not applicable - tech companies typically have negative book value

5Y.analysis: DCF grew from $60 to $100 while price crashed from $300 to $46

10Y.analysis: FCF has grown consistently. Price has not followed.

business_analysis.moat: Network effects, brand recognition, 430M+ active accounts
business_analysis.growth: 15%+ FCF growth, expanding into crypto and BNPL

risk_factors.margin_pressure: Take rate declining as competition intensifies
risk_factors.macro: Consumer spending slowdown would hurt transaction volumes

bull_case.thesis: Payments is a growing market. PYPL has scale. FCF undervalued.

bear_case.thesis: Apple Pay wins. Take rates collapse. Growth stalls.
